hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 570 m from property

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Bapak Fauzi yang terhormat
Terimakasih telah memilih dan menginap di Sultan Hotel Banda Aceh. kami sangat menghargai ulasan positif anda, Seluruh tim sangat senang mengetahui bahwa anda menikmati masa menginap dan merasa puas dengan semua aspek selama menginap di Hotel kami.
Kami berharap dapat menyambut anda kembali dalam waktu dekat.
Salam Hangat
Sultan Hotel Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: During our stay, part of the hotel was under renovation, but we were not disturbed at all.
comments.reviewTitle: The room is clean, the towels are new, and the staff is super friendly and pleasant.
comments.originalTitle: Kamarmya bersih, handuknya baru & stafnya super ramah dan bersahabat
comments.originalComment: Saat kami menginap hotelnya sebagian sedang renovasi, namun sama sekali tidak terganggu.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: I love all, friendly staff, good facilities and delicious food ❤️

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Near from Baiturrahman Mosque, the iconic of Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Il n’y a rien de spécial que nous n’ayons pas aimé. Peut être l’insonorisation qui n’est pas formidable.
comments.reviewPositives: L’hôtel est très bien situé, les chambres sont confortables et nettoyées tous les jours. Chaque jours de nouvelles serviettes. Le personnel est extrêmement gentil. Nous n’avons pas testé le petit déjeuner.
comments.reviewTitle: Bel hôtel et bel emplacement. C’est pas le luxe mais c’est vraiment bien.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Bapak Khairul yth
Terima kasih atas masukan dan koreksinya kepada kami, hal tersebut menjadi masukan bagi kami untuk memberikan pelayanan yang lebih baik kepada pelanggan kami.
Atas nama manajemen dan seluruh tim, kami mohon maaf atas ketidaknyaman yang anda alami selama menginap ditempat kami.
Izinkan kami untuk bisa melayani Anda sepenuh hati pada kunjungan berikutnya.

Salam hangat
Sulthan Hotel Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Im Bad ist immer das Wasser gestanden, schon als wir ankamen. 
Leider wurde in das Zimmer eingebrochen, als wir Essen waren und unser Bargeld gestohlen. 
Zum Frühstück gab es kalte Pommes und ein Sandwich.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Ibu Elda Yang Terhormat
Terima kasih atas masukan anda kepada kami,hal tersebut menjadi panduan bagi kami untuk memberikan pelayanan yang lebih baik kepada pelanggan kami kedepannya.
Atas nama manajemen dan seluruh tim, kami berterimaksih karena anda telah meluangkan waktu anda untuk memberikan feed back kepada kami.
Izinkan kami untuk bisa melayani Anda sepenuh hati pada kunjungan berikutnya.
Salam hangat
Sultan Hotel banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Both renovations to attract more guests because the location is already strategic.
comments.originalComment: Bth renovasi biar mkn rame tamunya Krn lokasi udah strategis

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Wij hadden een kamer in het nieuwere gedeelte. Zeer ruime en schone kamer met groot, zeer comfortabel bed. Goede verlichting. Goede badkamer. Ontbijt in orde. Zeer lekkere omelet.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: シャワーの出が悪く、温水が出るまで時間がかかった。
comments.reviewPositives:
便利な立地。
スタッフは少ないが親切で、フェリーに乗るための早い朝食にも対応してくれる。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Ibu Nadiyah Yang Terhormat

Terima kasih telah memilih dan menginap bersama kami.
Terima kasih juga atas ulasan positif Anda
Seluruh tim di sini sangat senang mengetahui bahwa Anda menikmati masa menginap dan merasa puas dengan semua aspek selama menginap di sini.
Kami berharap dapat kembali menyambut Anda di hotel kami dalam waktu dekat.

Salam hangat,
Sulthan hotel Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
The very very friendly staff. They were really interested and took care of reserving our fast boat tickets the next day
Also breakfast at 06:30 was no problem!
comments.reviewTitle: Central, lot of restaurants, ATM etc

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Ibu Mustika Yang Terhormat

Terima kasih telah memilih dan menginap bersama Sultan Hotel.
Terima kasih juga telah meluangkan waktu menuliskan feed back kepada kami.
Seluruh tim di sini sangat senang mengetahui bahwa Anda menikmati masa menginap dan merasa puas dengan semua aspek selama menginap di sini.
Kami berharap dapat kembali menyambut Anda di hotel kami dalam waktu dekat.

Salam hangat,
Sulthan hotel Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Hotel was very low occupancy. Only me n friends are occupying the hotel 😅

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Some mold on the walls. The worst pillow I have ever had. Equipment an Air conditioner are old.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: This place needs some serious renovation. In some places the plaster is falling off the ceiling. It's huge, but it looks like most of the rooms aren't used at all. Not the best hotel in Banda Aceh.
comments.reviewPositives: The room itself was clean and in ok condition. The staff was friendly and engaged. The breakfast is brought to your room, it was also ok.
comments.reviewTitle: The hotel's good days are long gone
